name: Lisa Pizza
recipeIngredient: Low-fat mozzarella cheese and cheddar cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to the temperature specified on the Pizza Crust package.
2. Assemble the pizza using the prepared ingredients: spread the pizza sauce over the crust, top with pepperoni, and sprinkle with low-fat mozzarella and cheddar cheeses.
3. Place the assembled pizza on a baking stone.
4. Cook in the preheated oven for the time specified on the pizza crust package.
5. Remove the pizza from the oven when it is crispy on the outside and soft inside.
The Chef's Comments:
"I finally used the baking stone I got for Christmas last year. I made a quick stop at the food store on my way home from work one day, grabbed some easy-to-prepare ingredients, and threw together a quick pizza that turned out really good - Neil thought I'd bought it!" - Lisa
